infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Spekto uses your camera to record property walkthroughs.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Spekto records audio during property walkthroughs.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Spekto tags your recordings with GPS coordinates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Spekto lets you upload identity documents from your photo library.
